title: portfolio-OS-2026
description: A Windows 11-inspired interactive developer portfolio that provides a complete desktop-like experience inside the browser.
longDescription: Portfolio OS reimagines a traditional portfolio as a fully interactive operating system. Users can explore projects, skills, experience, and applications through draggable windows, a taskbar, start menu, and desktop environment.

title: campusHub
description: A full-stack event booking and management platform for browsing, registering, and managing events.
longDescription: campusHub allows users to discover events, register online, manage bookings, and make secure payments. It also includes an administrative dashboard for organizers to manage events and attendees efficiently.

title: Interview-Prep
description: An AI-powered mock interview platform designed to help students and job seekers practice interviews.
longDescription: Interview-Prep provides role-based interview practice with real-time communication features and AI-assisted feedback. The platform helps users improve confidence, communication, and technical interview performance.

title: Student-Placement-Predictor
description: A machine learning project that predicts student placement outcomes using academic and skill-based data.
longDescription: This project applies machine learning algorithms and data analysis techniques to identify factors affecting student placements and predict placement outcomes with high accuracy.

title: soham-portfolio-2026
description: A modern personal portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, experience, and achievements.
longDescription: A responsive developer portfolio built to present technical skills, projects, education, certifications, and professional experience with a modern user interface.

title: sliding-puzzle
description: A browser-based sliding puzzle game built using web technologies.
longDescription: An interactive puzzle game featuring tile movement logic, responsive design, and a clean user interface focused on user engagement and problem-solving.

title: SUPPORTGPT
description: An intelligent website support assistant powered by AI that provides instant, context-aware responses to user queries on any website.
longDescription: SUPPORTGPT is designed to integrate seamlessly into existing websites to act as a 24/7 support agent. It uses LangChain and OpenAI models to fetch context and generate highly accurate responses to customer questions.

title: 3D-WEB
description: An immersive 3D web experience showcasing advanced WebGL rendering, interactive 3D scenes, and modern browser-based graphics.
longDescription: This project explores the boundaries of what is possible in the browser with WebGL and Three.js, creating an interactive 3D scene with custom lighting, materials, and camera controls.
